name: R5ExpressionElementMapToR4
title: Cross-version mapping for FHIR R5 Expression to FHIR R4 Expression
description: This ConceptMap represents cross-version mappings for elements from a FHIR R5 Expression to FHIR R4.

target.comment: Element `Expression.description` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Expression.description` as `Equivalent`.
Element `Expression.description` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Expression.description` as `Equivalent`.

Element `Expression.name` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Expression.name` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The mappings for `Expression.name` do not cover the following types: code.
The mappings for `Expression.name` do not cover the following types based on type expansion: value.

Element `Expression.name` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Expression.name` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The mappings for `Expression.name` do not cover the following types: code.
The mappings for `Expression.name` do not cover the following types based on type expansion: value.
Element `Expression.language` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Expression.language` as `Equivalent`.
Element `Expression.language` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Expression.language` as `Equivalent`.

Element `Expression.expression` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Expression.expression` as `Equivalent`.
If Expression.expression and Expression.reference are both present, the Expression.expression might just be a name pointing something within the referenced content.

Element `Expression.expression` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Expression.expression` as `Equivalent`.
If Expression.expression and Expression.reference are both present, the Expression.expression might just be a name pointing something within the referenced content.

Element `Expression.reference` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Expression.reference` as `Equivalent`.
If both a reference and an expression is found, the reference SHALL point to the same expression.

Element `Expression.reference` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Expression.reference` as `Equivalent`.
If both a reference and an expression is found, the reference SHALL point to the same expression.

Element `Expression.name` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Expression.name` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The mappings for `Expression.name` do not cover the following types: code.
The mappings for `Expression.name` do not cover the following types based on type expansion: value.
